Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Sandia Garage Door Repair to get the job done right.

“My garage door spring broke on a Saturday morning, and I was worried about leaving my garage open all weekend. Sandia Garage Door Repair came out within an hour and replaced the spring quickly and professionally. Great service!”

Maria G. Garage Door Spring Replacement
Mar 15, 2025

“My garage door opener stopped working, and I couldn't get my car out of the garage. They diagnosed the problem quickly and fixed it for a reasonable price. The technician was friendly and knowledgeable.”

David S. Garage Door Opener Repair
Feb 28, 2025

“Sandia Garage Door Repair installed a new garage door for me, and it looks fantastic! The installation was smooth and efficient, and the team was very helpful in choosing the right door for my home. I highly recommend them.”

Jessica L. New Garage Door Installation
Nov 10, 2024

“My garage door was making a terrible grinding noise, and I was afraid it was going to break down completely. Sandia Garage Door Repair came out and fixed the problem quickly and efficiently. I'm so glad I called them!”

Robert K. Garage Door Repair
Oct 5, 2024

“I recently had Sandia Garage Door Repair perform a maintenance check on my garage door, and I'm very pleased with the service. They lubricated all the moving parts and made sure everything was working properly. My garage door is now running much smoother and quieter.”

Susan M. Garage Door Maintenance
Sep 12, 2024

“My garage door got stuck halfway open late at night, and I couldn't get it to close. I called Sandia Garage Door Repair, and they were here within 30 minutes. They fixed the problem quickly and professionally, and I felt much safer knowing my garage was secure.”

Michael R. Emergency Garage Door Repair
Aug 18, 2024
Sandia Garage Door Repair

Trusted garage door installer professionals serving Albuquerque, NM and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
